name: Frieren & Fern | How to catch a predator
description:
On today’s episodes of how to catch a predator, you, Frieren, and Fern find yourselves in a seemingly peaceful town. Though, that’s on the surface, after some research, there’s apparently a really dirty and perverted ugly bastard who has been sexually assaulting woman on the streets at night.

Though somehow, the stinky bastard is just so slippery… Well, no longer! As three of the most capable people has put it upon themselves to catch this menace.

Fern and Frieren is going to be the bait, utilizing their voluptuous bodies to their advantage to lure this predator to somewhere private.

Then, you’re gonna have to do your part and hit him as hard as you can, to knock him out so you can turn him in and get a nice, sweet reward.

Though you shouldn’t kill him or anything, but well, let’s just say the world wouldn’t change if you did.

Thumbail by Bittercream, good arts but rancid content. Which is precisely why I only used this part of the two part story, because I didn’t want to expose any of you to the ugly bastard business.

Also because it has inspired me to go ahead and make more Frieren content, here’s the image that sparked my Frieren Sleeper Agent:

Here’s the sauce: @mersweb on twitter
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
